summary: Raise the published CLI Go toolchain floor to 1.26.4 so standard-library vulnerability fixes are enforced by go install.
reason: Go 1.26.4 carries fixes for reachable standard-library vulnerabilities reported against earlier 1.26 toolchains; the catalog-wide docs floor must match each module go directive.
validated_outcome: Bulk verification confirmed all direct published CLI go.mod files declare go 1.26.4 or newer after the sweep.
